brief.targetAudience: people who want switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: Coffee switchers have a specific pain point — jitters, crashes, dependency — and Tulsi Green Tea is a direct, credible answer that makes the conversion case obvious.
copyOptions.visual_description: A warm, sunlit kitchen countertop scene with soft morning light streaming through a window. An organica Tulsi Green Tea box and a freshly brewed cup of golden-green tea sit center frame, steam gently rising, surrounded by a few fresh tulsi leaves and a small ceramic honey dish. The mood is calm, clean, and unhurried — the kind of morning ritual that feels like a healthy upgrade.
headlines: Ditch the Jitters. Keep the Ritual.
Feel Calm. Feel Clear. Feel Better.
subheadlines: Organica Tulsi Green Tea gives you steady energy — no crash, no anxiety, no regrets.
Thousands have already made the switch. Your gentler morning routine starts today.
Same cozy cup. Zero jitters. Tulsi Green Tea is the upgrade your mornings deserve.
